---
title: "Edith Agnes Longueville"
---

## Edith Agnes Longueville

**Dates:** (1838/9-1926)

### Biography

It seems reasonable to identify the Miss Longueville to whom CMY wrote, who evidently knew Frances Wilbraham (who lived in Chester), with Edith Agnes Longueville (1838/9-1926) daughter of the Rev. John Gibbons Longueville (1810-1882), Rector of Eccleston, just outside Chester.

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 17th [1864]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
